title: Ahmoodio Optimized
description: Optimization mod made by Ahmoodio can increase fps from 20-30 fps to 100+ fps
body:
Optimization mod made by ahmoodio can increase fps
it uses vulkan mod instad of sodium but you can swap out sodium for vulkan and still get a good result.

results may vary from device to another

### using the Ahmoodio Optimised pack
![Ahmoodio Optimised](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3031033816ec55755cdae8d5631a8d278e80df3b_0.webp)

# SPECS
- cpu: reyzen 3 3200u
- ram: 12GB
- GPU:AMD Radeon  Vega 3 graphics
